lines.chinese: 弗兰克的第一个工作是什么？
lines.raw: What was Frank's first job? | 弗兰克的第一个工作是什么？

lines.english: Yesterday afternoon Frank Hawkins was telling me about
lines.chinese: 昨天下午，弗兰克·霍金斯正在给我讲
lines.raw: Yesterday afternoon Frank Hawkins was telling me about | 昨天下午，弗兰克·霍金斯正在给我讲

lines.english: his experiences as a young man.
lines.raw: his experiences as a young man. | 他年轻时的经历。
Before he retired, | 在他退休之前，
Frank was the head of | 弗兰克是一家

lines.english: a very large business company, but as a boy he used to work in a small shop.
lines.chinese: 非常大的商业公司的负责人，但小时候他曾在一家小商店工作。
lines.raw: a very large business company, but as a boy he used to work in a small shop. | 非常大的商业公司的负责人，但小时候他曾在一家小商店工作。

lines.english: It was his job to repair bicycles
lines.chinese: 他的工作是修理自行车，
lines.raw: It was his job to repair bicycles | 他的工作是修理自行车，

lines.english: and at that time he used to work fourteen hours a day.
lines.chinese: 那时候他每天工作十四个小时。
lines.raw: and at that time he used to work fourteen hours a day. | 那时候他每天工作十四个小时。

lines.english: He saved money for years and
lines.raw: He saved money for years and | 他攒了好几年的钱，

lines.english: in 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
lines.chinese: 1958年他买下了一间自己的小作坊。
lines.raw: in 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own. | 1958年他买下了一间自己的小作坊。

lines.english: In his twenties Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
lines.chinese: 二十多岁时，弗兰克曾为飞机制造备件。
lines.raw: In his twenties Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes. | 二十多岁时，弗兰克曾为飞机制造备件。

lines.english: At that time he had two helpers.
lines.raw: At that time he had two helpers. | 那时候他有两个助手。

lines.english: In a few years the small workshop had become a large factory
lines.chinese: 几年之内，这个小作坊就变成了一家大工厂，
lines.raw: In a few years the small workshop had become a large factory | 几年之内，这个小作坊就变成了一家大工厂，

lines.english: which employed seven hundred and twenty-eight people.
lines.chinese: 雇佣了七百二十八名工人。
lines.raw: which employed seven hundred and twenty-eight people. | 雇佣了七百二十八名工人。

lines.english: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years and the long road to success.
lines.chinese: 弗兰克回忆起他艰难的早年和漫长的成功之路时笑了。
lines.raw: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years and the long road to success. | 弗兰克回忆起他艰难的早年和漫长的成功之路时笑了。

lines.english: He was still smiling when the door opened and his wife came in.
lines.chinese: 门开了，他妻子走进来的时候，他还在笑。
lines.raw: He was still smiling when the door opened and his wife came in. | 门开了，他妻子走进来的时候，他还在笑。

lines.english: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle!
lines.chinese: 她想让他修理他们孙子的自行车！
lines.raw: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle! | 她想让他修理他们孙子的自行车！
